articles.title: Understanding Unusual Options Activity | Nasdaq
articles.snippet: Unusual options activity (UOA) occurs when specific options contracts trade at volumes far exceeding their historical averages, often signaling that institutional traders or informed investors are placing strategic bets on a stock’s future price movement.
